$description: Base render-root settings the SDK spreads onto its OUTERMOST wrapper on every render path (component AND template) — whole-tree normalization served as DATA, the Unoverse equivalent of the design-system's Shadow-DOM baseline (.gravity-component reset). It sets the DS typography (font family/size/weight/line-height/colour) so every node inherits it without a per-component style; the SDK authors none of these values — they reference the typography + colour tokens.
